name: IconLoading
source_code:
// components/icons/IconLoading.tsx
import mergeTW from "utils/mergeTW";

export const IconLoading = ({ className = "" }: { className?: string }) => (
  <svg
    className={mergeTW(`animate-spin h-5 w-5 -ml-1 mr-3 ${className}`)}
    xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
    fill="none"
    viewBox="0 0 24 24"
  >
    <circle
      className="opacity-25"
      cx="12"
      cy="12"
      r="10"
      stroke="currentColor"
      strokeWidth="4"
    ></circle>
    <path
      className="opacity-75"
      fill="currentColor"
      d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
    ></path>
  </svg>
);

visual_summary: IconLoading is a icon loading UI component from the floatui corpus. It provides reusable other behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: IconLoading
Description: IconLoading is a icon loading UI component from the floatui corpus. It provides reusable other behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
Style: utility-styled
Interactions: animated
Tags: floatui, icon, loading, other

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
